text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What a crowd...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The stands of the Nakayama Racecourse are
absolutely packed. Everyone can't wait to see the
long-awaited Satsuki Sho!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Of course! And didja hear that Biwa Hayahide's
racing today? She's Narita Brian's older sister!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Say, who was it that was in the magazine again?
You know, the little cute one!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: You mean Narita Taishin?

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I dunno about her. She's a little too small.
Might have more of a fighting chance if she was a
bit sturdier...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, everybody says Winning Ticket and Biwa
Hayahide are in the top two! Best keep an eye on
'em till the Derby, I say!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Yeah? I'll keep that in mind.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Seriously? I wouldn't even be here if I wasn't
"sturdy" enough. I'll show you who the top two
are...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Clueless idiots!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Well... Here we are—the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'll be up against Ticket and Taishin, which
means...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Exactly. This is going to be a close battle for sure.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But this is the first race of the Classic Triple
Crown tour. I can't afford to lose.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
A loss here wipes out any chance of being
considered the greatest of my generation.
choice_data_list: Then let's get out there and win!
Then let's get out there and win!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: You'd better believe I will!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad I participated in the Asahi Hai F.S. and
learned how to deal with my nerves.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Time to head over to the paddock...
Step, step, step...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hm? That's...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Taishin? She looks unusually stiff.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, she won't be able to run at her best if she's
all wound up like that. I should talk with her and
help her relax.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
(What happened to her? She looks incredibly
fierce...)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The competitors are coming up to the paddock!
Next up is...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh! It's already my turn. I'd better hurry!
